description:
Run the VeraCrypt encryption benchmark and create a performance report.

1. Open VeraCrypt and navigate to Tools > Benchmark.
2. Set the Buffer Size to 100 MB.
3. Run the benchmark.
4. Once complete, create a text report at `/home/ga/Documents/benchmark_report.txt`.

The report must contain a table with the following columns for all tested algorithms:
- Algorithm Name
- Encryption Speed (MB/s)
- Decryption Speed (MB/s)
- Mean Speed (average of Enc/Dec)

At the bottom of the report, explicitly state:
- "Fastest Algorithm: [Name] ([Speed] MB/s)"
- "Slowest Algorithm: [Name] ([Speed] MB/s)"

Base your Fastest/Slowest conclusions on the Mean Speed.
